# X Reach

X Reach is the X/Twitter-only split of Agent Reach for Codex-style workflows.

## Quick start

- Install guide: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/install.md
- Downstream usage: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/downstream-usage.md
- Codex integration: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/codex-integration.md
- Python SDK: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/python-sdk.md
- Mission spec runtime: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/mission-spec.md
- Troubleshooting: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
- Repository README: https://github.com/iwachacha/x-reach/blob/main/README.md

## Stable surfaces

- `x-reach channels --json`
- `x-reach doctor --json`
- `x-reach doctor --json --probe`
- `x-reach collect --operation <op> --input <value> --json`
- `x-reach collect --spec mission.json --output-dir .x-reach/missions/<run> --json`
- `x-reach schema collection-result --json`
- `x-reach schema mission-spec --json`
- `x-reach plan candidates --input .x-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `x-reach ledger validate --input .x-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `x-reach ledger summarize --input .x-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `x-reach ledger query --input .x-reach/evidence.jsonl --filter "channel == twitter" --json`
- `x-reach ledger append --input RESULT.json --output .x-reach/evidence.jsonl --json`
- `x-reach export-integration --client codex --format json`
- Python: `from x_reach import XReachClient`

## Scope

- Supported channel: `twitter`
- Purpose: channel registry, readiness diagnostics, thin read-only collection helper
- X Reach does not choose request scale, collection routes, ranking, summarization, or posting
- External projects should prefer `x-reach collect --json` and should not copy `.codex-plugin` or `x_reach/skills` by default
